groupings.title: Product Lifecycle
groupings.description: Skills for planning complete products from market research through support, growth, and operations.

groupings.title: UI Design & Product Craft
groupings.description: Skills for modern, fast, subtle, mobile-first, responsive interfaces.

groupings.title: Growth & Conversion
groupings.description: Skills for acquisition, positioning, landing pages, pricing pages, funnels, and launch growth.

groupings.title: Pricing & Monetization
groupings.description: Skills for SaaS pricing, subscriptions, payments, purchases, entitlements, and revenue systems.

groupings.title: Mobile & Game Product Systems
groupings.description: Skills for mobile app monetization, retention, refunds, notifications, game economies, IAP, IAA, and rewards.

groupings.title: Distribution, Platforms & Operations
groupings.description: Skills for store launch, OS integration, backup, restore, support, and product operations.

groupings.title: Agent Skill Operations
groupings.description: Skills for creating, curating, validating, and operating reusable agent skills.
